name: Heidi McLeod Law Office PLLC
description_short: San Antonio-based bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7 filings and loan modifications, led by Board Certified attorney Heidi McLeod with 30+ years of experience.
description_long:
Heidi McLeod Law Office PLLC is a San Antonio bankruptcy firm founded and operated by Heidi McLeod, an attorney with over 30 years of legal experience in consumer finance and debt relief. McLeod is Board Certified in Consumer Bankruptcy by the Texas Board of Legal Specialization and served as former president of the San Antonio Bar Association. The firm has established itself as a legal services provider in South Central Texas, serving clients from San Antonio, Austin, and the Rio Grande Valley.

The firm offers two primary services: Chapter 7 bankruptcy filings and loan modification assistance. For Chapter 7 cases, they help qualifying clients eliminate outstanding debts without wage garnishment or payment plans. In loan modification work, the firm provides guidance on reverse mortgage adjustments and financing options to help clients maintain home ownership while achieving financial stability. The firm emphasizes a personalized approach, with Attorney McLeod personally meeting with each client to review their specific financial circumstances and available options.

The firm distinguishes itself through its deep specialization in bankruptcy law, personal attorney involvement in case review, and extensive experience spanning three decades. The website emphasizes compassion and understanding of the stress associated with financial hardship, positioning the practice as client-centered rather than high-volume. The firm's Board Certification and bar association leadership provide third-party validation of expertise.

The primary limitation is that this is a specialized legal practice focused narrowly on bankruptcy and loan modifications—not a comprehensive debt relief platform. Prospective clients should understand that this firm handles legal filings rather than debt settlement or credit repair. The website provides limited information about pricing, payment structures, or specific case outcomes, which may require direct consultation to evaluate affordability and fit.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Attorney holds Board Certification in Consumer Bankruptcy from Texas Board of Legal Specialization, indicating recognized expertise
30+ years of legal experience with founder personally involved in client consultations
Former president of San Antonio Bar Association, suggesting professional standing and community involvement
Serves tri-regional area (San Antonio, Austin, Rio Grande Valley) providing geographic accessibility
Free initial consultation available to evaluate client's Chapter 7 or loan modification options
Emphasis on personalized attention rather than assembly-line processing
Specializes in both Chapter 7 debt elimination and reverse mortgage loan modifications
cons: Law firm provides no pricing information or fee structure on website, requiring contact for cost estimates
Limited to two service areas (bankruptcy and loan modifications), not a full-spectrum debt relief provider
No case outcomes, success rates, or client testimonials actually displayed on the website despite mentioning them
Website lacks clarity on Chapter 13 bankruptcy services—only Chapter 7 is detailed, despite being common option
No information about timeline, process steps, or what to expect during bankruptcy filing
best_for: Texas residents in San Antonio, Austin, or Rio Grande Valley areas facing overwhelming unsecured debt eligible for Chapter 7 discharge
Homeowners with reverse mortgages seeking professional guidance on loan modification to maintain property ownership
Individuals wanting personalized legal counsel from a specialized bankruptcy attorney rather than high-volume firm
Consumers seeking Board Certified bankruptcy expertise with established professional credentials and bar association involvement
diagnosis: Best for Texas residents in South Central Texas facing qualifying debt seeking specialized Chapter 7 bankruptcy representation from a Board Certified attorney with deep experience. Primary caveat: this is a legal filing service, not a debt settlement or credit repair firm, and clients should expect to pay legal fees for bankruptcy representation; the website provides no pricing information, requiring direct contact for cost disclosure before engagement.
services: Debt elimination and fresh start planning
Home preservation and loan modification guidance
Legal representation serving South Central Texas region
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 3355 Cherry Ridge Dr #214, San Antonio, TX 78230
